acquisition method: Data were collected in positive mode using a Data Dependent Acquisition m/z of 375–2000
alkylation reagent: Chloroacetamide was added to a final concentration of 40 mM
alkylation concentration: Chloroacetamide was added to a final concentration of 40 mM
cleavage agent: the samples were digested using trypsin at 37 °C overnight
instrument: peptides were analyzed by online nano-high-pressure liquid chromatography (UPLC) electrospray ionization-tandem mass spectrometry (MS/MS) on an Q Exactive Plus Instrument
labeling: Ubiquitination assays were done in a buffer containing 50 mM Tris pH 7.5, 150 mM NaCl, 5 mM MgCl2, and 5 mM DTT.
